        }

        }

            font-size: 20px;

        }

        input,

        button:focus {
            border: 0;
            outline: 0 !important;
        }

        input {
            width: 300px;
            padding: 14px;
            max-width: calc(100% - 80px);
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
        }
    </style>
</head>
